The AWS CloudFormation template for this Serverless application

C:\\workspace\\Serverless Recruitment &.serviceRawFile:
service: placement-platform

provider:
  name: aws
  runtime: nodejs18.x
  region: ap-south-1
  stage: dev
  environment:
    USER_POOL_ID: ${env:COGNITO_USER_POOL_ID}
    APP_CLIENT_ID: ${env:COGNITO_APP_CLIENT_ID}

useDotenv: true

build:
  esbuild:
    bundle: true
    minify: false
    format: cjs
    target: node18

functions:
  authorizer:
    handler: src/authorizer.handler

  hello:
    handler: src/hello.handler
    events:
      - http:
          path: /hello
          method: get
          cors: true
          authorizer:
            name: authorizer
            type: token
            identitySource: method.request.header.Authorization
            resultTtlInSeconds: 0
